Plot nested LOSO predictions by season

Source: R/m2_loso_cv.R
plot_nested_loso_predictions.Rd

Produces a faceted ggplot of observed vs predicted positivity for each held-out season from nested LOSO results. Similar to plot_stage2_joint_fit_by_season() but uses out-of-sample predictions from the CV object rather than in-sample fits.

Usage

plot_nested_loso_predictions(
  cv_result,
  dat_raw = NULL,
  y_max = 0.5,
  show_ci = TRUE,
  title = "Nested LOSO: predicted vs observed by season"
)

Arguments

cv_result

Output of nested_loso_cv() or one element of nested_loso_grid_search()$cv_results.

dat_raw

Optional aligned data for true ignition lines.

y_max

Numeric upper y-axis limit.

show_ci

Logical; draw approximate prediction intervals.

title

Plot title.

Value

A ggplot object.
